# Scenario: Full buffer render from API message response (commit-tools-with-thinking)
# Uses :refresh to load the /session/:id/message response and render all messages.
# This tests the complete render pipeline: user message, assistant messages with
# reasoning/thinking parts, text parts, tool parts (bash), and step-start/step-finish.

:session ses_2af30985affeQRwLJ5aDBcwHZr
:directory /Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el

# Load the saved API response and render the full buffer
:refresh commit-tools-with-thinking/messages.json

# --- Assertions ---

# User message text should be rendered
:assert-contains commit and push

# Reasoning/thinking content should be rendered
:assert-contains Thinking

# Assistant text should be rendered
:assert-contains I detect implementation intent

# Bash tool parts should show commands
:assert-contains git status
:assert-contains git diff

# Second assistant message text
:assert-contains no changes to commit or push
